summary:
Fluctuating PSA levels do not reliably exclude prostate cancer; even with normal or varying PSA values, a significant proportion of patients may progress despite close monitoring. Therefore, biopsy cannot be safely avoided based solely on PSA pattern changes.  
$\boxed{B}$
